bio: I am a Machine Learning Engineer at Deep Breathe. I am also involved in research at the Critical ML Lab, where I have worked on research collaborations with Apple, Nissan, and FAR.AI on LLM safety, domain adaptation, and other computer vision applications.

During my undergraduate studies at Waterloo Engineering, I was a finalist for the Alumni Gold Medal, received the Best Design Award and Yuen Family Foundation Award for my capstone, and Honorable Mention for the CRA Outstanding Undergraduate Researcher Award.
bioFooter: My research interests primarily center around building robust and safe AI systems and also advancing the frontiers of medical AI.
